text: I feel curiosity blooming inside me as I enter this brightly lit, modern space. The bold colors and large letters on the R+D wall suggest a focus on research and development—an interplay of exploration and creation. Surrounded by innovation and the questioning of boundaries, I find myself pondering the nature of knowledge and progress. The tangibility of ideas displayed here makes me feel excited to engage, analyze, and partake in the contemplation of how humans shape, and are shaped by, their inventions.
